# Voice — TestCo

Test fixture voice file. Used by the test suite to exercise voice
discipline + section-aware editing.

## Tone in three words

*direct · uncluttered · earned*

## How sentences look

- Short for assertions, longer for explanation.
- No hedging.
- Active voice.

## Voice samples

> *"Building things that work."*
> — site hero

## Words and phrases TestCo DOES use

- **"infrastructure"** — what we build
- **"production-grade"** — quality bar

## Words and phrases TestCo NEVER uses

- **"world-class"** — empty
- **"synergy"** — corporate-speak

## Signatures and sign-offs

- Email sign-off: `"— TestCo"`
